hero.subtitle: Manager IoT
hero.description: A personal IoT device management system that helps you monitor fire alerts, gas levels, temperature, and receive realtime notifications through the dashboard and email.

items.title: IoT device management
items.desc: Add and monitor fire alarm modules, gas alarm modules, temperature sensors, and more through a friendly interface.

items.title: Smart notifications
items.desc: Receive realtime alerts when gas levels exceed thresholds, temperature is high, or sensors disconnect. Send email and notifications until you acknowledge them.

items.title: Charts and history
items.desc: View notification history, device alert counts, access statistics, and sensor data charts.

items.title: Clear permissions
items.desc: Admins manage users and devices. Users monitor their personal dashboard and update their profile.

items.title: AI assistance (optional)
items.desc: Integrate LangChain and LangGraph to automate processing and provide smarter alerts.

footer.description: Personal IoT project. Smart monitoring for your home and space.
footer.copy: Copyright {{year}} DTECH - A personal project by Tien Dat
